chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1410 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of main case. 17.02.2025 Mr. Ghulam Sarwar Baloch, Assistant Attorney General for Pakistan. Mr. Safdar Hussain Laghari advocate for respondent No.2. None present for the petitioners nor intimation received. Record reflects that this petition was filed on 09.12.2020 and for once it was fixed in Court on 15.12.2020 when notices were ordered to be issued to the respondents as well as DAG. However, then the petitioners chosen not to pursue their petition as they did not attempt to fix the matter in Court for further proceedings; and, such conduct on the part of petitioners depict their lack of interest. Consequently, in such circumstances, the petition cannot be kept pending without any progress for an indefinite period, as such, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
